title: My thoughts on the Bun Rust rewrite
summary: Andrew Kelley, creator of Zig, critiques Bun's decision to rewrite its JavaScript runtime from Zig to Rust. He argues the rewrite is premature, discards Zig's unique strengths like compile-time execution and seamless C interop, and may not solve Bun's core performance issues. The post sparks debate on language choice for systems programming.
